description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For the active domain that is still unverified but already has a previous contact‑verification reminder email logged, change its primary contact email to a new address and send another verification email so its status reflects that a new verification has been sent.
tasks.name: For the active domain that is still unverified but already has a previous contact‑verification reminder email logged, change its primary contact email to a new address and send another verification email so its status reflects that a new verification has been sent.
tasks.description: For the active domain that is still unverified but already has a previous contact‑verification reminder email logged, change its primary contact email to a new address and send another verification email so its status reflects that a new verification has been sent.

tasks.instruction: From your contact verification center, resend verification notices today to the three most recently registered domains that are still unverified so that exactly three of them show a reminder sent for today.
tasks.name: From your contact verification center, resend verification notices today to the three most recently registered domains that are still unverified so that exactly three of them show a reminder sent for today.
tasks.description: From your contact verification center, resend verification notices today to the three most recently registered domains that are still unverified so that exactly three of them show a reminder sent for today.

tasks.instruction: For the domain whose contact is currently suspended for verification while the domain itself is still active, correct the contact phone number into the required international format with the matching country and submit the details for review so its verification status changes from suspended to pending review.
tasks.name: For the domain whose contact is currently suspended for verification while the domain itself is still active, correct the contact phone number into the required international format with the matching country and submit the details for review so its verification status changes from suspended to pending review.
tasks.description: For the domain whose contact is currently suspended for verification while the domain itself is still active, correct the contact phone number into the required international format with the matching country and submit the details for review so its verification status changes from suspended to pending review.

tasks.instruction: Find the active domain that expires soonest within the next 30 days and currently uses an unverified individual contact, then switch it to a fully verified business or organization contact profile so its contact status reflects a verified business contact instead of an unverified individual.
tasks.name: Find the active domain that expires soonest within the next 30 days and currently uses an unverified individual contact, then switch it to a fully verified business or organization contact profile so its contact status reflects a verified business contact instead of an unverified individual.
tasks.description: Find the active domain that expires soonest within the next 30 days and currently uses an unverified individual contact, then switch it to a fully verified business or organization contact profile so its contact status reflects a verified business contact instead of an unverified individual.

tasks.instruction: Update your contact verification notification settings so the account receives a weekly email summary, no SMS messages, and only for domains that are still pending verification.
tasks.name: Update your contact verification notification settings so the account receives a weekly email summary, no SMS messages, and only for domains that are still pending verification.
tasks.description: Update your contact verification notification settings so the account receives a weekly email summary, no SMS messages, and only for domains that are still pending verification.

tasks.instruction: Open the contact verification notice for the active domain whose name contains the word "studio" and is using an individual contact that is pending verification, then change the contact type to business or organization by adding an organization name and updating the job title to reflect ownership before continuing verification.
tasks.name: Open the contact verification notice for the active domain whose name contains the word "studio" and is using an individual contact that is pending verification, then change the contact type to business or organization by adding an organization name and updating the job title to reflect ownership before continuing verification.
tasks.description: Open the contact verification notice for the active domain whose name contains the word "studio" and is using an individual contact that is pending verification, then change the contact type to business or organization by adding an organization name and updating the job title to reflect ownership before continuing verification.

tasks.instruction: In the contact verification center, open the active domain whose status is pending verification and whose history shows a previously re‑sent verification email, then resend the verification notice only if the most recent verification email entry is more than 7 days old so a new history record is added.
tasks.name: In the contact verification center, open the active domain whose status is pending verification and whose history shows a previously re‑sent verification email, then resend the verification notice only if the most recent verification email entry is more than 7 days old so a new history record is added.
tasks.description: In the contact verification center, open the active domain whose status is pending verification and whose history shows a previously re‑sent verification email, then resend the verification notice only if the most recent verification email entry is more than 7 days old so a new history record is added.

tasks.instruction: Create a new collaborator account with just enough access to view domains and manage contact verification notices, without any DNS, transfer, or billing permissions, and give the role a label indicating it assists with verification tasks.
tasks.name: Create a new collaborator account with just enough access to view domains and manage contact verification notices, without any DNS, transfer, or billing permissions, and give the role a label indicating it assists with verification tasks.
tasks.description: Create a new collaborator account with just enough access to view domains and manage contact verification notices, without any DNS, transfer, or billing permissions, and give the role a label indicating it assists with verification tasks.

tasks.instruction: From the dashboard alerts, snooze the contact verification banner for one domain that has auto‑renew enabled and an expiration date more than 60 days from today, choosing to snooze only that domain’s banner while leaving all other verification banners visible.
tasks.name: From the dashboard alerts, snooze the contact verification banner for one domain that has auto‑renew enabled and an expiration date more than 60 days from today, choosing to snooze only that domain’s banner while leaving all other verification banners visible.
